0.text: Nodular consolidation area measuring approximately 12x7 mm in the lateral segment of the right middle lobe, in the peripheral subpleural area

1.text: Newly developed ground-glass halo observed in the periphery of the nodular consolidation area in the lateral segment of the right middle lobe

2.text: Area of increased density consistent with an uncertain limited consolidation in the peribronchial area in the posterior part of the right upper lobe

3.text: Free pleural effusion observed in both pleural spaces, with the deepest part on the right measuring 25 mm, extending to the apex and fissure in the patient's lying position
